meta.note: Loadout setup per mode — core skill, Rabam (skill enhancement) picks, add-on set, and locked skills. Sourced from the Discord guides (RoNNiE PvE, Sarron PvP) and the spreadsheet's Tricks/Quick-slot sheet. Quick-slots are general (not mode-specific in the source).

sources.pve: BDO Valkyrie Discord — RoNNiE PvE guide

quickslot.note: Our PA — can only be cast from a quick slot.
Our E-buff — can only be cast from a quick slot.
Useful when you can't put up block first.
Protected swap from quick slot; also prevents accidentally using it after Wave of Light.

quickslot.name: Celestial Cry
quickslot.note: If you don't like rabam inputs (slower than the input).
If you don't like rabam inputs (slower than the input).
If you don't like rabam inputs (slower than the input).
If you don't like rabam inputs (slower than the input).
For whenever Celestial Spear/Smite is on cooldown. Can be used from awakening.

quickslot.name: Shining Judgment of Light
quickslot.note: When you instantly need some protected movement. Can be used from awakening.
Prevents accidentally using Sanctitas de Enslar afterwards.
Useful for chasing in duels — can only be cast from a quick slot.
Best if the charge-up is cancelled; quick-slot for cooldown tracking.
Can be used to pull out your weapons quickly.

core.note: Main DPS tool, very low cooldown.

pve.core_note: RoNNiE names Castigatio the core skill of the PvE kit.

rabams.note: Level-56 Rabam (vs Celestial Cry). Crit prebuff + Bound.
Level-57 Rabam (vs Divine Slam). DP buff for self + allies.

pve.rabam_note: RoNNiE's PvE Rabam picks. The level-57 choice goes to Divine Descent (DP buff) — PvP swaps it for Divine Slam (down-smash); both bind SHIFT+Z.

addon.author: RoNNiE
addon.caption: RoNNiE's PvE add-on set (one of, or the best PvE Valk on EU)
breakdown: Intuitive DP-debuff stacking (2nd add-on is spot-dependent)

locked.note: if you're only a Marni grinder
if you're new to the class

pve.locked_note: RoNNiE's PvE lock list (newer players). Conditional locks are noted.

core.note: Also a catch (RMB), but combos specify "any core except Sacrum Ferit".

pvp.core_note: Sarron's catch cores. Most combo families say "any core except Sacrum Ferit".

rabams.note: Level-57 Rabam pick over Divine Descent — down-smash fishing (SHIFT+Z).

pvp.rabam_note: PvP keeps the level-56 Rabam but takes Divine Slam over Divine Descent at level 57 for down-smash fishing.

downsmash.note: S+E ➔ LMB (needs Celestial Spear off CD)

pvp.downsmash_note: Down-smash fishing priority, top to bottom (Sarron).
pvp.locked_note: The PvP guide gives no explicit lock list. PvP UNLOCKS several skills that the PvE list locks, because they are catches / re-CCs / finishers — see below.
